articles.summary: LodeStar says purchase closing costs fell 2.9% in 2025, with 28 states posting declines. Costs in D.C. fell 21.1% while Delaware's rose 4.5%.

articles.title: Caregiver survey shows widespread burnout, with Gen Z hit hardest
articles.summary: Half of Gen Z caregivers said caregiving has damaged personal relationships, exceeding rates reported by millennials (41%) and Gen X (38%).
